summary: No security issues found. Start script sources env files with conditional check, no hardcoded secrets. SENSITIVE_CRED_FILES is configured. Nginx vhost is minimal (listen 80 only, SSL handled by reverse proxy). No new attack surface beyond what simpledashboard already exposes.

checks.check: No hardcoded secrets in start script
No hardcoded secrets in ecosystem.config.js entry
nginx listens on port 80 only (SSL at reverse proxy)
nginx has proper proxy headers (X-Real-IP, X-Forwarded-For, X-Forwarded-Proto)
No SIMPLEBOUNTY_BOT_TOKEN in start script (correct per task spec)
product.yaml is gitignored (no accidental commit of server paths)
Pre-commit security checks pass (no secrets in diff)
